title: Disney Frozen II Girls 4pc Water Bottles and Sticker Sheet Back to School Bundle
description:
Make back-to-school magical with this Disney Frozen II 4-piece Gift Bundle, featuring beloved characters like Elsa, Anna, and Olaf! Perfect for young fans of Frozen II, this fun and functional set includes three reusable water bottles and a sheet of Frozen-themed stickers - ideal for school, playdates, sports, and more. Each bottle is made from lightweight, BPA-free plastic and designed with kid-friendly pull-top lids, making it easy for little hands to stay hydrated all day long. The colorful sticker sheet adds a touch of Frozen fun to lunchboxes, notebooks, or water bottles - perfect for personalizing school supplies.

Disney Frozen II Girls 4pc Water Bottles and Sticker Sheet Back to School Bundle

Make back-to-school magical with this Disney Frozen II 4-piece Gift Bundle, featuring beloved characters like Elsa, Anna, and Olaf! Perfect for young fans of Frozen II, this fun and functional set includes three reusable water bottles and a sheet of Frozen-themed stickers - ideal for school, playdates, sports, and more.

Each bottle is made from lightweight, BPA-free plastic and designed with kid-friendly pull-top lids, making it easy for little hands to stay hydrated all day long. The colorful sticker sheet adds a touch of Frozen fun to lunchboxes, notebooks, or water bottles - perfect for personalizing school supplies.

Key Features

  • COMPLETE 4PC FROZEN 2 SET - Includes 3 reusable water bottles and 1 sheet of Frozen-themed stickers featuring Elsa, Anna, and Olaf.
  • PERFECT FOR BACK TO SCHOOL - Great for staying hydrated throughout the day at school, sports, or on the go.
  • KID-FRIENDLY DESIGN - BPA-free plastic bottles with easy-to-use pull-top lids, sized just right for small hands.
  • FUN PERSONALIZATION - Sticker sheet lets kids decorate lunchboxes, notebooks, water bottles, and more with their favorite Frozen characters.
  • GREAT GIFT FOR FROZEN FANS - An ideal birthday, holiday, or back-to-school gift set for girls who love Disney’s Frozen II.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: FRZPS651
  • UPC: 637740086485
  • Color: Multicolor

Bundle Includes:

(3) Disney Frozen II Reusable Water Bottles

(1) Sheet of Frozen II Stickers

Whether you're getting ready for the school year or looking for the perfect gift for a Frozen fan, this officially licensed Disney set is sure to delight! Great for birthdays, holidays, or as a special surprise for the princess in your life.
